def negative_large_response_body_fully_buffered_in_memory_before_send():
    rule_id = "large_response_body_fully_buffered_in_memory_before_send"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Large response body buffered completely in memory before writing; use StreamingResponse."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
